subject: Fermi GBM trigger 666393834/220212892 is not a GRB
body:
S. Poolakkil (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 666393834/220212892
at 21:23:49.68 UT on 12 February 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a SGR."
